title: Exclusive-SpaceX IPO filing shows Elon Musk can retain board control
description: SAN FRANCISCO / BOSTON, April 23 (Reuters) - SpaceX is telling prospective investors its board will not need a majority of ⁠directors who are independent of the company, according to an excerpt of its IPO filing reviewed by ‌Reuters, underscoring how founder Elon Musk is retaining control of the rocket and artificial intelligence maker.

title: Nasscom appoints Fractal cofounder Srikanth Velamakanni as Chairman
description: Srikanth Velamakanni takes the helm at Nasscom as the new Chairperson, succeeding Sindhu Gangadharan. With a robust background in AI and analytics, he aims to drive a rapid transformation in service sectors through artificial intelligence.

title: There are fixes for AI’s toll on the power grid. Here’s why they’re not happening

title: Meet ACE: The AI robot can beat human table tennis pros
description: A new robot developed by Sony can now take on top table tennis players, highlighting how quickly artificial intelligence is advancing into complex human skills.
content:
